main_event: Civilian in Denver observed bright star-like object with red and green flashes for 10 minutes on 8 March 1967.
sighted_object: like a very bright star; bright white with little flashes of red and green; flashes of green around that appeared to be port holes
witness_description: civilian housewife, near Lookout Mountain, Denver
interesting_points: Shape like a very bright star, size of pin and pea
Flashes of green around that appeared to be port holes
Object dimmed to pin point size then disappeared
Flight path straight forward and then reverse; disappeared slowly to North
First called to witness attention by friend
Located N of the cross on the hill and West over the mountains (near Lookout Mtn)
FTD Form 164 forwarded to witness but not returned; AF concluded insufficient data
